signin.heroDescription: One sign-in takes you to both Admin and Web. Keep organization, permissions, and collaboration aligned.
signin.title: Sign in to your account
signin.subtitle: Enter your account details below to continue
signin.accountPlaceholder: Enter your phone number or account
signin.passwordPlaceholder: Enter a password with at least 8 characters
signin.agreementPrefix: By signing in, you agree to the
signin.contactAdmin: Contact your system administrator if you need an account.

toast.noOrg: No available organizations are linked to this account
toast.captchaExpired: Captcha state expired. Please sign in again.

validation.accountRequired: Enter your phone number or account
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

tenantDialog.title: Choose an organization
tenantDialog.description: This account is linked to multiple organizations. Choose the tenant or campus to enter.

tip.default: Hold the slider and drag it to the far right
tip.moving: Hold the slider and drag it to the far right

signup.heroDescription: Sign up with a phone number or account name to create a Stackloom tenant. If you skip the tenant name, the backend will generate one and attach the WEB::GUEST role automatically.
signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Already have an account?
signup.accountPlaceholder: Enter your phone number or account name
signup.accountHint: You can sign up with a phone number or an account name. Phone signups are stored as the default account name too.
signup.tenantHint: Leave this empty and the backend will generate the tenant name and slug, then create the default WEB::GUEST role for that tenant.
signup.passwordPlaceholder: Enter a password with at least 8 characters
signup.agreementPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our

toast.success: Sign-up succeeded. Continue to sign in.

errors.accountExists: This account already exists. Sign in directly or try another account.
errors.tenantExists: This tenant name already exists. Choose another tenant name and try again.
errors.configurationConflict: Tenant initialization conflicted with existing data. Try again later or contact an administrator.

validation.accountRequired: Enter your phone number or account name
validation.nicknameMax: Nickname must be 100 characters or fewer
validation.tenantNameMax: Tenant name must be 255 characters or fewer
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match

invite.heroTitle: Create your account to join the invited workspace
invite.heroDescription: This signup flow creates your account directly inside the invited tenant. It does not create a new tenant workspace.
invite.title: Create your invited account
invite.subtitle: Already have an account?
invite.invalidDescription: This invite link is invalid or expired. Return to the invite page and ask for a new link if needed.

toast.success: Account created successfully. Sign in to enter the invited team.

success.title: Account created successfully
success.description: Your account is ready and has already been linked to the invited team. Sign in to continue.

success.title: Tenant created successfully
success.description: Your account and tenant workspace are ready. Sign in with the account you just created. The first sign-in will carry the WEB::GUEST role context.

recovery.title: Recover password
recovery.description: Choose phone or email verification, then set a new password.

toast.codeSent: If the account exists and is bound, the verification code has been sent.
toast.resetSuccess: Password has been reset. Please sign in again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match
